# PROXIMAX - Performance Marketing Agency

PROXIMAX is a premier Performance Marketing Agency in India specializing in Lead Generation and ROI focused strategies.

## Core Services
- SEO & GMB Dominance: Expert on-page and off-page SEO to improve search rankings.
- Performance Marketing: High-ROI marketing campaigns to scale business growth.
- Lead Generation: High-converting systems for consistent customer acquisition.
